---
title: "Strict mode and checks"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Strict mode and checks}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(contextR)
```

Strict mode enforces number consistency and language rules.

```{r}
fit <- lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars)
out <- context(fit, mode = "strict")
context_audit(out)
```

Use `safe` mode for sanitization instead of hard failure.

```{r}
out_safe <- context(fit, mode = "safe")
out_safe
```
